chart.title: GDP per employed person
chart.subtitle: Gross domestic product (GDP) divided by the total number of people employed in the economy. This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.
chart.note: This data is expressed in [international-$](#dod:int_dollar_abbreviation) at 2021 prices.
chart.citation: World Bank staff estimates, via World Bank (2026)

GDP per person employed (constant 2021 P.citationShort: World Bank staff estimates, via World Bank (2026) – processed by Our World in Data
